nasb.text: Let those be ashamed and humiliated Who seek my life; Let those be turned back and dishonored Who delight in my hurt.

esv.text: Let them be put to shame and confusion who seek my life! Let them be turned back and brought to dishonor who delight in my hurt!

cnv.text: 願那些尋索我性命的，抱愧蒙羞； 願那些喜悅我遭害的，退後受辱。

ccb.text: 愿谋取我性命的人蒙羞受辱， 愿喜欢我遭害的人狼狈逃窜。

csbs.text: 愿那些寻索我性命的，抱愧蒙羞； 愿那些喜欢我遭害的，后退受辱。
